2_FamilyEducation.Additional: Former Asst. Professor BHU; President, Junior Doctors Assoc. (1974); RSS/ABVP since college

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Party: BJP (contested 2002 on Hindu Mahasabha ticket; joined BJP before 2007)
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Current Role: Member of Parliament, Rajya Sabha, UP (2022–2028); National General Secretary, BJP (since 30 Jan 2023); Chairman, Parliamentary Standing Committee on Home Affairs
4_PoliticalTrajectory.MLA Terms: 4 terms from Gorakhpur Urban — 2002 (Hindu Mahasabha), 2007, 2012, 2017 (all BJP). Vacated seat for CM Yogi Adityanath's 2022 contest.
4_PoliticalTrajectory.MP Terms: Rajya Sabha MP from UP since 5 July 2022 (won unopposed on BJP nomination 31 May 2022)

5_ElectoralRecord.2017 Margin: 60,730 votes (over INC's Rana Rahul Singh with 61,491 votes)
5_ElectoralRecord.2022: Did not contest; vacated for CM Yogi (BJP). Won Rajya Sabha 2022 unopposed.

7_LegalCriminalRecord.Status: Acquitted in case under IPC 147/323/352/447 on 4 April 2023; two other cases dropped. No conviction on record.
7_LegalCriminalRecord.Note: BJP issued notice in 2019 for sharing objectionable posts

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Trained pediatrician (MBBS 1976, MD 1981 BHU). Former Asst. Professor BHU. RSS/ABVP since student days. Entered politics in 2002. Built 20+ year dominance over Gorakhpur Urban (4 consecutive Vidhan Sabha terms) before elevation to Rajya Sabha (2022). Appointed BJP National General Secretary (January 2023).

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: Hindu nationalist positions aligned with BJP/RSS; healthcare & development in Gorakhpur; national security; active critic of Congress/SP in Parliament
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Public Perception: Popular, approachable grassroots leader in Gorakhpur; known for direct voter engagement. Key BJP face in eastern UP. Elevation to Rajya Sabha and BJP National GS seen as major organisational reward.

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: Moderately active — regular posts on X (political commentary, party positions, parliamentary work) and Facebook.

7_LegalCriminalRecord.Case Details: No criminal cases declared in affidavit

1_PersonalVitals.Full Name: Ajay Mohan Singh Bisht (monastic name: Yogi Adityanath)

2_FamilyEducation.Religious Role: Mahant (Head Priest) of Gorakhnath Math, Gorakhpur (since Sept 2014)

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Current Role: Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh (2017–present; first UP CM to serve two full consecutive terms)
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Youngest MP: Youngest MP in 12th Lok Sabha (1998) at age 26

5_ElectoralRecord.Election: UP Vidhan Sabha 2022 – Gorakhpur Urban AC-322
5_ElectoralRecord.Note: First Vidhan Sabha contest; previously 5-term Lok Sabha MP from Gorakhpur

6_FinancialProfile.Movable Assets: ₹95,98,053 (cash, bank deposits, post office savings, vehicle, jewellery)
6_FinancialProfile.Income Source: Salary and allowances as People's Representative (former MP)

7_LegalCriminalRecord.Historical Cases: 3 cases in 2014 affidavit; all withdrawn or dismissed before 2022
7_LegalCriminalRecord.Notable: 20-year-old murder case dismissed by special court in 2019; 1995 case withdrawn after becoming CM

8_CareerProfession.Profession: Social & Religious Work; Salary/Allowances as People's Representative
8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Disciple of Mahant Avaidyanath; elected MP from Gorakhpur 1998 at age 26; 5 Lok Sabha terms (1998–2014); founded Hindu Yuva Vahini (2002); became Mahant of Gorakhnath Math (Sept 2014); appointed CM of UP on 19 March 2017; won first Vidhan Sabha from Gorakhpur Urban 2022; re-appointed CM for second term — UP's longest-serving CM.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: Bulldozer justice; Anti-Romeo squads; Crackdown on illegal slaughterhouses; CAA; UP Expressway expansion; UP Global Investors Summit; Mahakumbh 2025
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Public Perception: Polarising — 'Bulldozer Baba' for supporters (law & order); critics allege extrajudicial encounters and communal politics
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Ideology: Hindutva, Hindu nationalism, BJP right wing

1_PersonalVitals.Full Name: Subhawati Upendra Dutt Shukla (also: Sabhawati / Subhavati Shukla)

2_FamilyEducation.Husband: Late Upendra Dutt Shukla (BJP Vice President, UP; died May 2020, cardiac arrest)
2_FamilyEducation.Sons: Arvind Dutt Shukla and Amit Dutt Shukla (both joined SP with mother in Jan 2022)

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Previous Party Affiliation: None directly; husband was senior UP BJP VP
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Candidacy Strategy: SP fielded her — a Brahmin widow of a BJP stalwart — to split BJP's Brahmin vote against Thakur CM Yogi

5_ElectoralRecord.Election: UP Vidhan Sabha 2022 – Gorakhpur Urban AC-322

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Wife of late UP BJP VP Upendra Dutt Shukla. After his death (May 2020), she and her two sons joined SP (Jan 2022). SP fielded her from Gorakhpur Urban against sitting CM Yogi Adityanath as a Brahmin face. She contested and lost in her debut election.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: SP platform: social justice, anti-incumbency, Brahmin outreach
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Public Perception: Sympathy candidate leveraging late husband's Brahmin political legacy; SP's strategic Brahmin counter to Yogi's Thakur identity

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: No significant verified digital presence

2_FamilyEducation.Education: Ph.D. (Hindi), M.A., B.Ed., B.J. (Journalism), Sangeet Prabhakar
2_FamilyEducation.Institution: Deen Dayal Upadhyay University (DDU), Gorakhpur — Ph.D. awarded 2010
2_FamilyEducation.Additional: Gold medal awardee for poetry and tabla recitals

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Prior Elections: 2012 UP Vidhan Sabha — contested from Sahajanwa (Gorakhpur) as Independent; lost
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Party History: Former ABVP member; former VP of DDU Gorakhpur Students' Union; joined INC ~2019

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Doctorate in Hindi literature from DDU Gorakhpur (2010). Published poetry collections: 'Chetna Ke Geet' and 'Geet Aur Msutak'. Renowned soprano at kavi sammelans and mushairas. Tabla virtuoso with national & international accolades. INC candidate against CM Yogi in 2022.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: Social welfare; women's empowerment; arts and cultural promotion
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Media Coverage: Featured in Outlook India as 'A Poet, A Tabla Player, And Yogi's Challenger'

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: Active Facebook presence; Twitter handle @iamchetnapande; moderate local digital presence

1_PersonalVitals.Voter Roll: Gorakhpur Rural constituency, Serial No. 83, Part No. 64

2_FamilyEducation.Institution: P.H. Secondary School, Amdhari Nighauri, Siddharthnagar

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Role: BSP Sector In-charge, Gorakhpur district; Head of BSP Muslim Bhaichara Committee
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Party History: 20 years of active BSP ground work in Gorakhpur district; first-time Vidhan Sabha contestant in 2022

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Trader by profession. 20-year BSP veteran and Gorakhpur district sector in-charge. Head of BSP Muslim Bhaichara Committee. Previously contested local body elections on BSP ticket. First-time assembly candidate in 2022.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: BSP Bahujan ideology; Muslim community mobilisation; social justice
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Public Perception: Long-standing BSP loyalist and grassroots worker; minority community representative

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: Minimal; one Facebook page identified; no significant independent web presence

2_FamilyEducation.Additional: Practicing lawyer; legal background used in Dalit rights activism

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Role: National President, ASP; Founder & Chief, Bhim Army
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Prior Elections: 2022 Gorakhpur Urban — first Vidhan Sabha contest
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Subsequent: Won 2024 Lok Sabha from Nagina (UP) by 1,51,473 vote margin; currently serving as MP
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Founded: Bhim Army (2014/2015); Aazad Samaj Party (Kanshi Ram) on 15 March 2020

5_ElectoralRecord.2024 LS Result: Won Nagina Lok Sabha seat (2024 general election); margin 1,51,473 votes

7_LegalCriminalRecord.Criminal Cases: Multiple declared in 2022 affidavit: IPC 332 (voluntarily causing hurt to deter public servant) × 4; mischief by fire/explosive × 4
7_LegalCriminalRecord.Status: Pending — widely reported as politically motivated, related to Dalit rights agitation
7_LegalCriminalRecord.Note: Jailed multiple times in connection with anti-caste violence protests

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Born Jatav (Dalit), Saharanpur. Pursued BA + LLB from Garhwal University. Co-founded Bhim Army (2014–15) for Dalit rights through education & legal means. Rose to national prominence after Saharanpur caste violence (2017). Founded Aazad Samaj Party (Kanshi Ram) on 15 March 2020. Contested 2022 Vidhan Sabha from Gorakhpur Urban against CM Yogi; lost deposit. Won 2024 Lok Sabha from Nagina as MP. Currently MP in 18th Lok Sabha.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: Dalit empowerment; Ambedkarite social justice; anti-caste discrimination; constitutional rights for SCs/STs; opposition to CAA/NRC; Bhim Pathashalas community schools
9_PublicPresencePolicy.Public Perception: One of India's most prominent young Dalit leaders; TIME Magazine 100 Emerging Leaders 2021; 'every party is wary of' — multiple media outlets

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: Very high — one of India's most-followed Dalit political leaders on social media; verified presence on all major platforms

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Role: BSP candidate / local party functionary in Gorakhpur

5_ElectoralRecord.2017 Positions: BJP won with 1,22,221; INC 2nd with 61,491; BSP 3rd with 24,297

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Local BSP leader/candidate from Gorakhpur Urban. Contested 2017 UP Vidhan Sabha as BSP nominee, finishing 3rd with 24,297 votes (11.1%). No further public record of significant political office found.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: BSP platform — Dalit rights, social justice, Ambedkarite ideology

10_DigitalPresence.Digital Footprint: No significant digital presence found in public search results

4_PoliticalTrajectory.Role: Candidate; local social activist and contractor
4_PoliticalTrajectory.Nomination: Named in AAP's 5th candidate list (29 Jan 2022); endorsed by AAP MP Sanjay Singh as 'well-known face in Gorakhpur Sadar'

8_CareerProfession.Career Summary: Local contractor and social activist in Gorakhpur. Described by AAP leader Sanjay Singh as having worked with several social organisations and 'been fighting for people's causes for a long time in Gorakhpur Sadar'. Fielded by AAP for 2022 Vidhan Sabha; lost deposit.

9_PublicPresencePolicy.Key Policies: AAP: anti-corruption, free electricity, quality education, healthcare, good governance
